title: message_set destroy: two round trips to store (get then delete) — non-atomic TOCTOU
description: jmap.rs message_set destroy: fetches the message with get_messages to check existence and ownership, then calls hard_delete_message in a separate query. This is two separate SQLite operations with no transaction wrapping. Between the fetch and the delete another operation could mutate or delete the same message. More importantly, this is also an efficiency issue: one extra round-trip per destroyed message. The store layer should have a delete_message_if_owner method that does the ownership check and delete in a single DELETE ... WHERE id = ? AND sender_id = ? statement.
